series_description: This series documents bacteriological and sanitary surveys of shellfish growing areas for their acceptability and safety in the harvesting of shellfish. The series may contain, but is not limited to: sanitary shoreline surveys, field inspection reports, correspondence, and condemned areas and evaluations.

This series documents the inspection of shellfish and crab meat dealers for compliance with sanitary standards, as well as the issuance or denial of a certificate of inspection. This series may include, but is not limited to: certificates of inspection, floating permits, administrative hearings, plant inspections, and correspondence.
